prompt: Implement aggregate_energy(action_counts, energy_per_action). For every component and action count, multiply by the matching per-action energy and return component totals plus total. Reject negative counts or energies and raise KeyError when a requested component/action has no energy model. Do not count unused energy-table entries.
instruction: Implement aggregate_energy(action_counts, energy_per_action). For every component and action count, multiply by the matching per-action energy and return component totals plus total. Reject negative counts or energies and raise KeyError when a requested component/action has no energy model. Do not count unused energy-table entries.
